page.main: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 pt-28 pb-20
page.breadcrumbNav: mt-6 mb-8 text-xs sm:text-sm text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wide
page.headerImageWrap: relative h-[240px] sm:h-[280px] mb-6 overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-white/10
page.headerOverlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/40 to-transparent
page.headerTitleOnImage: absolute bottom-5 left-0 right-0 text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-semibold text-white px-4 drop-shadow-lg
page.mobileFilterBtn: w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-3 bg-white/10 border border-white/20 text-white text-sm font-medium rounded-lg hover:bg-white/15 transition-colors backdrop-blur-xl
page.overlay: fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-sm z-40 hidden lg:hidden
page.sidebar: w-full lg:w-72 flex-shrink-0 fixed lg:relative top-0 left-0 h-full lg:h-auto bg-[#0f0f0f]/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-r border-white/10 z-40 lg:z-auto transform -translate-x-full lg:translate-x-0 transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out lg:block
page.closeBtn: p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg transition-colors text-gray-300 hover:text-white
page.filterSidebarRoot: bg-white/5 rounded-lg border border-white/10 p-6 backdrop-blur-xl
page.sortDropdownSelect: appearance-none bg-white/10 border border-white/20 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 pr-8 text-sm font-medium text-gray-200 hover:border-white/30 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500 focus:border-transparent transition-colors cursor-pointer backdrop-blur-xl
page.topBar: flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center justify-between gap-3 mb-6
page.viewToggleGroup: flex items-center gap-0.5 rounded-lg border border-white/20 p-0.5 bg-white/5
page.mobileCount: text-xs text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wide mb-4 sm:hidden
page.productGrid: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4 sm:gap-5 lg:gap-6 items-start collection-product-grid
page.loadMoreBtn: bg-white/10 border border-white/20 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/15 transition-colors font-medium backdrop-blur-xl
page.emptyWrap: text-center py-16 bg-white/5 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl

header.container: text-center mb-16 relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-white/10

card.noImagePlaceholder: w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center text-gray-500

quickAddButton.base: absolute bottom-2 left-2 right-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-cyan-600 text-white py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium

pagination.container: flex justify-between items-center bg-white/5 rounded-lg border border-white/10 p-4 backdrop-blur-xl
pagination.button: flex items-center space-x-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors group text-gray-300 hover:text-white
